title: Portkey
description: Teleport between locations in a wizardly style.
body:
![Screenshot of a comment on a GitHub issue showing an image, added in the Markdown, of an Octocat smiling and raising a tentacle.](https://i.imgur.com/kwEYvqB.png)

This mod adds some blocks that if you enchant them they become into magical portkeys. **These portkeys allows players to teleport between locations.**

![Screenshot of a comment on a GitHub issue showing an image, added in the Markdown, of an Octocat smiling and raising a tentacle.](https://i.imgur.com/nXTOrc4.gif)

 

*"Why are they all standing around that manky old boot?"
"That isn't just any old manky boot mate. It's a portkey."*

#  **How does it work?**

**1.-** Craft one of our blocks and, on the enchanting table,  enchant the block with the portkey-enchant

![Screenshot of a comment on a GitHub issue showing an image, added in the Markdown, of an Octocat smiling and raising a tentacle.](https://i.imgur.com/KUdYXrp.gif)

**2.-** Use the enchanted portkey on a block to set the destination (If you want to change the destination, use the portkey in your hand while pressing shift to delete the saved destination)

**3.-** Use it again on another block to place the portkey and set the origin location

**4.-** Right-click on the placed portkey to teleport yourself to the previous set destination. Enjoy!

![Screenshot of a comment on a GitHub issue showing an image, added in the Markdown, of an Octocat smiling and raising a tentacle.](https://i.imgur.com/RwVU4HK.gif)


***But you must know this kind of magic CANT work between different dimensions.***

 

 

## **Right of Use**

- You can add this mod to a modpack (credits are appreciated). Note that the mod has not be fully tested on servers.
- Do NOT re-upload this mod on other websites. Always use a link to this page.
